name: VISHAY INTERTECHNOLOGY INC. Reg
summary: Vishay Intertechnology, Inc. is a global manufacturer of discrete semiconductors and passive electronic components. The company's products are used in virtually all types of electronic devices and equipment in the industrial, computing, automotive, consumer, telecommunications, military, aerospace, and medical markets. Vishay Intertechnology, Inc. is headquartered in Malvern, Pennsylvania, USA.
